arbiter_reasoning: Bear position prevails. Although Agent 2 and Agent 3 show positive signals (increased drilling and a modest_beat ~8.95%), Agent 4 disclosed broad GDELT coverage (18 articles) and applied a one‑tier conviction downgrade, indicating the news is likely priced in and reducing the information edge. Given the modest divergence and the GDELT disclosure, I decline to take a long position.
